knimeNode.name: DINOS Random Variable Settings test
knimeNode.shortDescription: Creates a series of random variable to be used for DINOS nodes settings to be set as flow variables

fullDescription.intro: Creates a series of random variable to be used for DINOS nodes settings as flow variables
fullDescription.option: Mode for which to generate settings

option.name: short name of second option (like in the dialog)

ports.outPort: Settings flow variables for DINOS nodes
